en: Look, sometimes people drift apart, Miles.
And I don't want that to happen to us, okay?
ko: 있잖아, 가끔 사람들은 서로 멀어지거든, 그리고 우리한테는 그런 일이 일어나지 않았으면 해, 알겠지?

en: Look, I know I don't always do what you need me to do or say what you need me to say, but I'm...
ko: 있잖아, 내가 항상 네가 원하는 대로 하거나 네가 듣고 싶은 말을 하는 건 아니지만,

en: I see this spark in you. It's amazing. It's why I push you, but it's yours.
Whatever you choose to do with it, you'll be great.
ko: 그걸로 뭘 하든, 넌 대단할 거야.

en: Look, call me when you can, okay?
You don't have to say it back, though.
